interactions.inputs: {"companyName":"Meridian Dynamics","industry":"Technology Consulting","subsector":"Digital Transformation","transcript":"Meeting with Meridian Dynamics VP of Sales and CTO. Current proposal turnaround is 5-7 business days. Need to reduce to under 2 hours. Budget approved for Q2 at $180K annual with potential expansion to $350K. Must integrate with existing Google Workspace. Need SOC 2 compliance documentation. Pilot in April, full rollout by end of Q2 2026."}
